creator: maxsteciuk@gmail.com
text:
I am sorry for confusion. I didn’t have to modify any other FreeBSD configurations except following the suggestion to change git user’s home directory location. When I create any FreeBSD user I don’t usually specify a user’s home directory location. But current gitlab.yml.example for the FreeBSD port seems to require a git user’s home is in /usr/local instead of /home or /usr/home. 
Thanks
Max
